response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience, drastically overqualified for an entry-level Junior Java Developer role. Their stack is primarily TypeScript/Node.js/DLang with only listed (not demonstrated) Java exposure, and German proficiency is only basic — falling short of the role's requirement for strong German communication. Retention risk and salary mismatch make this a poor fit despite strong engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Deep software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, agile)
Berlin-based with broad polyglot engineering experience
Strong track record of shipping production systems at scale
concerns: Massively overqualified — senior/staff level for a junior role
Java is listed but not a core demonstrated skill in recent roles
German is only basic; role requires strong German communication
